title: selaginella rupestris f. engelmannii
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. engelmannii, also known as a type of spikemoss, is a low-growing, evergreen plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris f. engelmannii include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which may contribute to its use in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves or stems, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or added to salves and ointments for topical use.
